description: Square ICE arrest card graphic built over a desaturated black-and-white close-up photograph of a pair of hands in metal handcuffs, shot at a low angle so the wrists and chain fill the frame. A dark gradient overlay across the left and bottom sits behind white and pale-cyan text. Top left, in bold uppercase cyan serif type: 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL', with a white subhead '1/22/2025 | Denver, CO.' Lower left, in large bold white sans-serif, the name 'Pablo Beningo Calva-Deamonte', followed by a 'CRIMES:' list reading '3 DUIs' and 'Unlawful reentering.' The DHS/ICE seal and 'ICE' wordmark sit at the bottom left. A red diagonal banner across the bottom-right corner reads 'DENVER FIELD OFFICE.'
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/22/2025 | Denver, CO; Pablo Beningo Calva-Deamonte; CRIMES: 3 DUIs, Unlawful reentering; DENVER FIELD OFFICE
